case_title: LANG NGUYEN VS. DIANA MOORE et al

docket_entries.description: AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LANG JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-05-2003 CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOV-05-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
